title: Ms. Judy’s House
bodyText: A big old wooden house in a huge, unnaturally quiet cavern past the Stonemason district — blue glow-worms, leafless trees that reach for each other, still black water. Interior is bigger than the outside: cluttered jars, drying plants, insect-lantern light, a fireplace whose flames move like ocean waves, the ritual corner (circular table, bowl, carafe), and the **meat wall** (her flesh-portal to elsewhere — survived the fire). Partially burned in S06 thanks to Brolin.
